name: Royal Priesthood Embassy
tagline: Discover Your True Identity in Christ
description: Join Royal Priesthood Embassy in Thika, Kenya. A Kingdom Embassy where you are equipped to establish heaven on earth through worship, discipleship, and authentic relationships.

theme2026.title: The Latter Rain
theme2026.scriptureText: Ask the LORD for rain in the time of the latter rain. The LORD will make flashing clouds; He will give them showers of rain, Grass in the field for everyone.

serviceTimes.name: Sunday Online Service
serviceTimes.description: Early morning worship and teaching for our online family. Join from anywhere in the world.

serviceTimes.name: Saturday Physical Service
serviceTimes.location: Voice of Grace, Behind Spoonzoom, Thika
serviceTimes.description: Our primary worship gathering — worship, teaching, and ministry time in the sanctuary.

serviceTimes.name: Kingdom Formation
serviceTimes.description: Blueprint Tuesdays — deep discipleship teaching and Holy Communion. Where Kingdom patterns are revealed.

serviceTimes.name: Thursday Partner's Meeting
serviceTimes.location: Voice of Grace, Behind Spoonzoom, Thika
serviceTimes.description: Corporate prayer and intercession for the nation, church, and families.

serviceTimes.name: Cell Group Meetings
serviceTimes.location: Voice of Grace, Behind Spoonzoom, Thika
serviceTimes.description: Corporate prayer and intercession for the nation, church, and families.

whatToExpect.title: Worship
whatToExpect.description: Experience authentic, Spirit-led worship that draws you into God's presence. Come as you are — no performance required.

whatToExpect.title: Teaching
whatToExpect.description: Practical, Bible-based teaching that equips you to walk in your royal identity and daily influence as an ambassador of the Kingdom.

whatToExpect.title: Community
whatToExpect.description: Genuine relationships with people who will welcome you, pray with you, and walk alongside you in your faith journey.

whatToExpect.title: Growth
whatToExpect.description: Pathways from first visit to deep discipleship through Kingdom Formation, cell groups, and ministry involvement.

beliefs.title: The Bible
beliefs.description: The ultimate constitution and manual for living, which God has magnified above His own name. Our final authority for faith and practice.

beliefs.title: God
beliefs.description: One God eternally existing in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit. The Creator and Sustainer of all things.

beliefs.title: Jesus Christ
beliefs.description: The Son of God, born of a virgin, lived a sinless life, died for our sins, and rose again. Our High Priest and Advocate.

beliefs.title: The Holy Spirit
beliefs.description: The third person of the Trinity, our Comforter, Teacher, and Guide. Leads believers into all truth through the inner witness.

beliefs.title: Salvation
beliefs.description: By grace through faith in Jesus Christ alone. A transition from spiritual death to being alive in Christ with a new nature.

beliefs.title: Sonship & Identity
beliefs.description: Believers are adopted as sons of God, receiving unconditional eternal security and the Spirit of adoption crying "Abba Father."

values.title: Identity
values.description: The Mantle — we are a royal priesthood, ambassadors of the Kingdom Embassy. Our identity in Christ is the foundation of everything.

values.title: Authority
values.description: The Rod — we walk in the authority of God's Word, seated in heavenly places, exercising dominion through partnership with the Holy Spirit.

values.title: Execution
values.description: The Sword — we are doers of the Word, executing Kingdom mandates with diligence, faith, and excellence in daily influence.

visitFaqs.question: What should I wear?
visitFaqs.answer: Come as you are! Most people dress casually or business casual. We care more about your presence than your appearance.

visitFaqs.question: Is there parking available?
visitFaqs.answer: Yes, there is parking near Voice of Grace behind Spoonzoom in Thika. Our hospitality team will guide you when you arrive.

visitFaqs.question: What about my children?
visitFaqs.answer: We have excellent children's ministry programs during services. Our trained volunteers create a safe, fun environment for kids to learn about Jesus.

visitFaqs.question: How long is the service?
visitFaqs.answer: Services typically run 90–120 minutes, including worship, teaching, and ministry time.

visitFaqs.question: Will I be asked to give money?
visitFaqs.answer: No. While we do receive offerings, there is no expectation for guests to give. Feel free to simply receive during your visit.

visitFaqs.question: Where exactly is the church located?
visitFaqs.answer: We meet at Voice of Grace, behind Spoonzoom in Thika, Kenya. Use the Google Maps link on our Visit page for directions.

visitFaqs.question: Can I watch online if I can't come in person?
visitFaqs.answer: Absolutely! Join our Sunday Online Service at 6:00 AM on Google Meet, or watch archived sermons on our YouTube channel.

visitFaqs.question: What is Kingdom Formation?
visitFaqs.answer: Kingdom Formation is our Tuesday evening discipleship gathering at 8:30 PM. It's a deep dive into Kingdom theology and identity — open to everyone.

welcomeMessage.title: Welcome to the Embassy
welcomeMessage.message: When you step into Royal Priesthood Embassy, you are entering a space where the laws of this place are not Kenya's laws — you are entering the Kingdom. Whether you're exploring faith for the first time or you've walked with Jesus for years, there is a place here for you. We can't wait to meet you.
welcomeMessage.author: Pastor Charles Muchemi
